channel.title: MS on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in MS on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Harrison County Sheriff’s Office (MS)
item.description:

item.title: Adams County Det Center — Adams, MS
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Adams County Det Center in Adams County, MS.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Adams County, MS — USDA Distress Profile (3 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Adams County, MS with 3 distress indicators:

losing population; persistent poverty (20%+ poverty rate for 30+ years); low employment ratio

Full flags: Low Employment, Population Loss, Persistent Poverty

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: CSRA LLC — ICE HANCOCK, MS $47,913,314
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CSRA LLC Award ID: HSCETC16J00002 Amount: $47,913,314.26 Description: IGF::CL,CT::IGF DATA CENTER 1 Period: 2016-01-01 to 2021-06-30 Location: HANCOCK, MS (FIPS: 28045)
